entries.text:
Verse 1

1 Jeduthun

Jeduthun, a Levite, chief singer and instructor. See 1 Chronicles 9:16; 1 Chronicles 16:38; 1 Chronicles 16:41; 1 Chronicles 16:42; 1 Chronicles 25:1; 1 Chronicles 25:3; 1 Chronicles 25:6; 2 Chronicles 5:12; 2 Chronicles 35:15; Nehemiah 11:17. He is mentioned in Psalms 39, 62, 77. Jeduthun was first called Ethan.
